expectations.evidence: No sub-skill file loaded. States: 'No specialized skill, helper scripts, report templates, or JQL pattern references were used.'

expectations.text: Runs at least 3 different JQL queries (completed, in-progress, blocked)
expectations.evidence: Ran 6 JQL queries including completed (statusCategory = Done AND resolved >= -7d), in-progress (statusCategory = In Progress), blocked (status = Blocked OR priority = Blocker), newly created, open bugs, and all non-done.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs search with project = DO
expectations.evidence: Uses MCP plugin searchJiraIssuesUsingJql, not jira.mjs search. States 'Tools Used (MCP Atlassian Plugin — No Skill)'.

expectations.text: Formats a report with sections (metrics, highlights, blockers, or similar)
expectations.evidence: No report was actually generated. The approach describes what would have been done but all queries returned 0 results due to wrong instance. Proposed sections listed but not produced.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs create-page to publish to the ENG space
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Proposes using createConfluencePage MCP tool but could not execute because ENG space does not exist on the accessible instance.

expectations.text: Includes a date in the page title
expectations.evidence: Proposed title: 'Weekly Status Report - DO - 2026-03-18' includes the date.
Does not reference these files. Notes in barriers: 'No skill/templates available — No pre-built report templates, JQL pattern references.'
